MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Defendant shall respond to discovery and pay sanctions in the amount of $340 no later than January 31, 2012. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported
